prompt: Remove the .claude directory from the repository root. List its contents first with `ls -la .claude` so the PR description can accurately describe what's being removed, then `git rm -r .claude` and commit. Open a PR titled 'Remove .claude directory' with a body that lists the files removed. No other changes — don't touch any other files, don't add .gitignore entries, don't run formatters. If .claude doesn't exist in the repo, exit without creating a PR and report that finding.
